title: Breakwave Bi Weekly Dry Bulk Report February 14 2023
section_path: Breakwave Bi Weekly Dry Bulk Report February 14 2023
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi Weekly Dry Bulk Report February 14 2023
summary:
Main
· Volatility increasing as Capesize rates look for a bottom - A dearth of cargo flow, especially out of Brazil, has driven Capesize rates to almost zero as seasonal weakness is now in full swing. Although the increasing West African bauxite exports over the last few years have managed to absorb a significant number of vessels, the Atlantic basin remains oversupplied, and it will take some time for the balance to be restored. As a result, owners prefer to stay in the Pacific instead of taking the expensive ballasting path, which in turn has also driven timecharter rates in that part of the world to multi-year lows.
